prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `50c07299`.
codex_response:
Implemented `50c07299`. The rule is: take the lone anti-diagonal segment and redraw the immediately preceding segment on the same counterdiagonal, one cell longer and shifted up-right. The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50c07299/verifier.py#L4), and the generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50c07299/generator.py#L30) constructs that same growth-chain family on square grids, with a bias toward the official `16x16`, background `7`, foreground `2` look.

I discarded the summary hint. `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, and the Opus summary said the new segment moves up-left, which contradicts the official examples; the correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50c07299/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the built preview sheet looks on-distribution. The package entrypoint is [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50c07299/__init__.py#L1).
